reference: I suggest a complete blood count and an ultrasound to rule out kidney stones, as the recurrence of kidney stones higher up could be the reason for this. Also, if you are running a fever, it might be acute pyelonephritis, and a blood count would provide a better idea of what it is. Meanwhile, drink plenty of fluids and take eight hundred milligrams of ibuprofen for the pain.
text: I suggest a complete blood count and an ultrasound to rule out kidney stones, as the recurrence of kidney stones higher up could be the reason for this. Also, if you are running a fever, it might be acute pyelonephritis, and a blood count would provide a better idea of what it is. Meanwhile, drink plenty of fluids and take 800 milligrams of ibuprofen for the pain.
